attacking_style: Excels on steep, punchy finishes in the final 2km, particularly on gradients above 10%. Attacks in the final hairpins or closing meters, using explosive power on steep ramps rather than sustained climbing.
team_tactics: Often operates in reduced groups where team support is minimal. Shows willingness to bridge gaps solo (40+ seconds demonstrated). Capable of leading chase efforts on major climbs but typically positioned for individual finish efforts.
terrain_preference: Steep gradient finishes (Mur de Huy, Romont, La Planche 24% gravel) are optimal. One-day punchy climbs ideal; struggles on consecutive mountain-top finishes and sustained HC climbing in stage races.
vulnerability: Exposed on consecutive mountain stages and prolonged HC climbing. Cannot maintain form across multi-day Grand Tour climbing blocks. Tactical positioning can leave him chasing rather than dictating.
key_patterns: Wins come on steep finishes 10%+ gradient, attacking inside final 2km (3 victories)
Can bridge 40-second gaps solo on climbs, showing strong pursuit ability (2 observations)
Struggles day-after-day in Grand Tours, dropped on consecutive MTFs despite holding form (2 observations)
Outsprint capability on steep finishes against pure climbers and time trialists (2 victories)
Effective in reduced groups on Ardennes-style finishes, less effective in pure GC climbing (4 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Recent 2022 results show evolution with Romandie and Fleche Wallonne victories demonstrating refined steep-finish technique and tactical maturity against top opposition
